title: Microcorys capitata
taxonomy: Microcorys capitata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the order Lamiales, which is a group of flowering plants that includes mint and lavender. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes over 600 genera. Microcorys capitata is a member of the genus Microcorys, which is a small genus of plants native to Australia. The classification of Microcorys capitata reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants in the order Lamiales and family Rubiaceae.
